title: Eva 01s changing chest plates and healing factor
display_title: Eva 01s changing chest plates and healing factor
wikitext:
[]: Eva 01's changing chest plates and healing factor             Quote Post by Dippindots » Sat Aug 24, 2013 11:28 pm jhffh

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Aug 28, 2013 12:15 am The only time we ever see Unit-01 explicitly regenerating itself is in ep 02 against Sachiel, and in ep 19 against Zeruel, the latter of which can be explained away with Particle Wave Matter (PWM) magic involving the use of Zeruel's arm (and even then, she does NOT regenerate the armor back, but merely a flesh arm). I'd boil the rest down to animation errors that simply get overlooked, because they're not directly important to anything involved with the plot.

[]:             Quote Post by Dippindots » Wed Aug 28, 2013 12:59 am agg

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Aug 28, 2013 1:29 am Depends what you're taking as "now" -- in ep 6, the chest plate that Ramiel burns through is winched off, for a new one to be fitted. As the armour is as much restraint as protection, fully awoken, EVA-01 is less likely to have anything to do with it by choice.

[]:             Quote Post by Dippindots » Wed Aug 28, 2013 1:43 am agggggggggg

[]:             Quote Post by Gob Hobblin » Wed Aug 28, 2013 1:58 pm One could assume that her AT Field is so strong at this point, muscle and bone over the Core would be simple window-dressing. It's her AT Field that provides the true protection. And remember, those Cores are not fragile.

[]:             Quote Post by Dippindots » Wed Aug 28, 2013 8:32 pm ghdf

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Wed Aug 28, 2013 8:58 pm Isn't the core right under the armor anyway? I thought Zeruel ripped it right open and started wailing on it. Core on the outside seems to be the standard for humanoid angelic creatures.

[]:             Quote Post by Dippindots » Wed Aug 28, 2013 9:06 pm aaa

[]:             Quote Post by ShockTrance » Wed Aug 28, 2013 10:48 pm Eva-01 has several good reasons not to regenerate the armor: - The immense protection afforded by her A.T. Field makes the armor unnecessary - The armor doubles as binders, so regenerating it would be limiting herself needlessly - Minus the A.T. Field, the core is still durable without any special protection Moreover, at that point, all of the Angels and other Evangelions are either destroyed or fossilized. It's not as though Eva-01 is floating off to intercept Arael in orbital combat; she's drifting off into the empty void. There's no real benefit gained from expending the energy necessary to regenerate the armor, even if the S2 Engine can pull power out of thin air. Furthermore, it could be the case that, after Eva-01 became fossilized, she lost the ability to manufacture new body parts and armor arbitrarily due to chemical changes in her composition.

[]:             Quote Post by Dippindots » Wed Aug 28, 2013 11:33 pm yyyy

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Fri Sep 06, 2013 2:54 am Topic locked by request of the OP. EDIT: A more senior staffer has informed me that this is a bad idea, that in cases where there is legitimate reason that others may want to contribute to or necro the thread there is no reason to lock.
